title: Mina Samy Tawfik Saad — Insights & Publications
description: Practical writing on healthcare transformation, PMO governance, medicine access, digital workflows and health informatics.

items.title: How to Digitize a Healthcare Support Workflow
items.content_text: A practical note on process ownership, clinical and operational decisions, escalation, reporting and training in healthcare workflow transformation.

items.title: Building Medicine Support Hub: Lessons from Workflow Architecture
items.content_text: Design principles behind a bilingual digital-health platform connecting requesters, reviewers, physicians, pharmacists, procurement, delivery and analytics.

items.title: Employee Support Program Transformation
items.content_text: A case study on moving a fragmented manual healthcare-support process toward a governed ticket-based operating model.
